name: J4D 2n1 Soothing Dog Shampoo – 500ml
shortDescription: J4D 2 In 1 Soothing Dog Shampoo 500ml gently cleanses and conditions sensitive skin, reducing irritation while leaving coats soft, shiny, and healthy.
description: J4D 2 In 1 Soothing Dog Shampoo 500ml is a gentle, dual-action shampoo and conditioner specially formulated for dogs with sensitive or irritated skin. This soothing formula cleanses away dirt and impurities while hydrating, softening, and detangling the coat, leaving your dog’s fur shiny, healthy, and easy to manage. Designed for regular use, it helps reduce dryness, itchiness, and irritation while promoting a comfortable, well-conditioned coat. Suitable for all dog breeds and coat types, this 2-in-1 shampoo makes grooming quicker, gentler, and more effective. Key Features 500ml 2-in-1 dog shampoo and conditioner Specially formulated for sensitive or irritated skin Hydrates, softens, and detangles the coat Suitable for all breeds and coat types Benefits for Pet Owners Gently cleanses while soothing sensitive skin Helps reduce dryness, itchiness, and irritation Makes grooming easier with soft, manageable fur Promotes a shiny, healthy-looking coat Product Advantages Dual-action formula saves grooming time Safe for frequent use on sensitive skin Enhances coat texture and overall appearance How to Use Apply to wet fur and massage gently from head to tail Rinse thoroughly and repeat if needed Suitable for weekly use or as required for sensitive dogs Benefits for Retailers Strong addition to pet grooming and dog care ranges Impulse-friendly 2-in-1 convenience product Appeals to customers seeking gentle and soothing dog care solutions
